rationale: The citing paper references Lee and Venkataraman (2022) once in the literature review to support a broad claim that add-on insurance research is still sparse. The citation functions as contextual background rather than as a source for the paper's hypotheses, mechanism tests, model specification, or empirical design. The core theoretical development and empirical positioning are built mainly around other works (e.g., Abito and Salant 2019; Jindal 2015), so this specific citation appears to be a passing framing mention.
